id.description: Unique pack identifier (lowercase slug, e.g. cap, abap, btp-core)

profiles.description: Profile IDs that include this pack (informational)

weight.description: Default sort priority; higher values appear earlier in context

base.description: If true, this pack is injected into every profile and always appears first

overlaps.description: Pack IDs whose content this pack subsumes (used for byte-budget deduplication)

locales.description: Locale-specific overrides for name and description

additive.description: If true, this pack augments (rather than replaces) the lower-layer pack with the same ID

additive_position.description: Where additive content is placed relative to the base pack's content

versions.description: Latest known versions for staleness checks
